title: Libra November 2026 Horoscope and Crystal of the Month

rank_math_title: Libra November 2026 Horoscope: Key Dates, Love, Career & Crystal of the Month
rank_math_description: Libra November 2026 monthly horoscope — key dates, love, career, health and Crystal of the Month (Lapis Lazuli). New Moon Nov 8 in Scorpio (money, self-worth); Gemini Beaver Full Moon Nov 24 (belief, meaning); Mars conjunct Jupiter Nov 16 in Leo (community, friends); Venus (your ruler) stations direct Nov 13.
content:
Libra November 2026 Horoscope and Crystal of the Month

Energy ThemeRevalue the worth, refine the meaning
Key DatesVenus (your ruler) + Mercury station direct Nov 13 / New Moon Nov 8 (Scorpio, 2nd house) / Mars conjunct Jupiter Nov 16 (Leo, your 11th) / Gemini Beaver Full Moon Nov 24 (9th house)
LoveVenus (your ruler) stationing direct releases the self-worth review; the 11th house Mars-Jupiter amplifies friendship-rooted love
Career2nd house Scorpio New Moon reopens money and self-worth; the 9th house Full Moon matures a belief, publishing, or meaning arc
Crystal of the MonthLapis Lazuli
Lucky ColorsDeep royal blue, gold-flecked indigo, soft rose
Lucky Number9
AffirmationI revalue the worth October clarified; I refine the meaning it implies.

This Month's Energy

Libra, November 2026 revalues the worth and refines the meaning. Venus (your ruler) and Mercury both station direct on November 13, releasing October's retrograde season with extra weight for you. The New Moon in Scorpio on November 8 falls in your 2nd house of money, body, possessions, and self-worth — a fresh start in what you earn and value. Then November 16 brings Mars conjunct Jupiter at 25°53' Leo, your 11th house of community, friends, and long-term vision — a peak friendship or collective moment. November 24 brings the Beaver Full Moon in Gemini, your 9th house of belief, study, travel, and meaning — a climax around a worldview. November's pattern: revalue the worth early, refine the meaning late.

Key Dates for Libra in November 2026

DateTransitMeaning for LibraDo / Avoid
Nov 8New Moon in Scorpio2nd house — fresh start in income, possessions, body, self-worth; commit to the value story October's review surfacedDo: set the price, organize the finances, claim the worth, address the body's needs
Avoid: undervaluing the work or impulsive big-ticket spending
Nov 13Venus + Mercury station directStation day — your ruler turns direct; the retrograde review season ends. Clarity returns to self-worth, money, and communicationDo: move forward on the money decision, sign the agreement, claim the worth
Avoid: rushing decisions in the 3 days around the station
Nov 16Mars conjunct Jupiter at 25°53' Leo11th house — community, friends, collective vision, long-term dreams peak; a once-every-two-years friendship or group-role amplificationDo: claim the role in the group, mend the friendship, name the dream, lead the circle
Avoid: holding onto a circle that no longer fits
Nov 24Beaver Full Moon in Gemini9th house — climax around belief, study, travel, publishing, meaning; a long-building worldview or course maturesDo: publish the work, commit to the course, take the trip, claim the belief
Avoid: holding onto a worldview you've outgrown
Nov 22Sun enters Sagittarius3rd house season — communication, writing, siblings, neighborhood through late DecemberDo: publish the piece, refine the message, mend the sibling tie
Avoid: spreading across too many channels
Early NovMars moves through Leo (your 11th)Community, friends, dreams stay active; the run-up to Nov 16 builds the circle momentumDo: reach out to the friend, claim the role, name the dream
Avoid: isolating yourself when the circle is calling

Career & Money

For Libra, November's money story opens at the 2nd house New Moon. The Scorpio New Moon on November 8 is a fresh start in what you earn and value — and with Venus (your ruler) stationing direct on November 13, the path is clear.

The Gemini Beaver Full Moon on November 24 (your 9th house) is the career climax — a long-building belief, publishing project, or meaning arc matures. Mars conjunct Jupiter in your 11th house on November 16 amplifies collective and friendship-led work. The Sun entering Sagittarius (your 3rd house of communication) on November 22 sharpens the message. Crystals for wealth can support the value claim; the practical move is revalue the worth early, refine the meaning late.

Love & Relationships

Venus (your ruler) stationing direct on November 13 is the love signature of the month — and Venus is your ruling planet, so this lands with extra weight. The October self-worth review releases; the path forward in love clears.

Mars conjunct Jupiter in your 11th house on November 16 amplifies friendship-rooted love — a friend may become more, or a friendship may deepen. The 9th house Gemini Full Moon on November 24 may shift the worldview within the partnership. Crystals for love can support the reopening; the deeper practice is revaluing the worth so the meaning the bond carries can be honest.

Health & Wellness

November's wellness story emphasizes the kidneys, lower back, and balance. The Scorpio New Moon on November 8 (your 2nd house) is the wellness reset of the month — reorganize food, hydration, and self-worth rhythms. The Sun entering Sagittarius (your 3rd house) on November 22 asks for gentle nervous system care.

Lapis Lazuli, your crystal of the month, is traditionally associated with clear communication, truth, and the third eye — a useful symbolic companion for a Venus-ruled air sign emerging from a retrograde season. Libra often carries tension in the lower back, kidneys, and adrenals; warm hydration, gentle stretching, and balanced food are especially helpful. This is lifestyle guidance, not medical advice; persistent concerns belong with a clinician.

Crystal of the Month: Lapis Lazuli

Why Lapis Lazuli fits Libra this month. You are Venus-ruled — your reflex is harmony, balance, beauty. November asks you to revalue what you earn while refining what you believe. Lapis Lazuli — with its deep royal blue flecked with gold — is traditionally tied to clear communication, truth, and the inner voice that values the self honestly. Where Blue Lace Agate would soothe and Rose Quartz would soften, Lapis Lazuli sharpens into truth. Perfect for the 2nd house Scorpio New Moon (revalue the worth) and the 9th house Gemini Full Moon (refine the meaning).

How to use it during November 2026. Place Lapis Lazuli at your throat or on your workspace on November 8 (the Scorpio New Moon). Hold it during any money or belief conversation through November 24.

Best date to use it: November 24, the Gemini Beaver Full Moon in your 9th house — hold Lapis Lazuli at your throat or third eye for 5 minutes at moonrise, naming the meaning you're publishing.

Read more: Lapis Lazuli Meaning and Best Crystals for Libra.

Monthly Crystal Ritual for Libra — November 2026

When: November 24, the Gemini Beaver Full Moon in your 9th house.
Crystal: Lapis Lazuli.
Intention: Refine the meaning the worth is meant to carry.

  1. Cleanse Lapis Lazuli under cool running water for 30 seconds on the morning of November 8 (the Scorpio New Moon). Let it sit on your workspace through November 8.
  2. Set the intention between the New Moon and the Full Moon (November 8–24): write down three pieces of worth you're revaluing — and the meaning you're ready to publish at the Full Moon.
  3. Act at the Beaver Full Moon on November 24: commit to the course, publish the work, claim the belief. Lapis Lazuli in your pocket during the act.
  4. Reflect once the Sun is in Capricorn (late December 2026): how has the meaning matured through the winter? Hold Lapis Lazuli during the review.

Shop Libra Crystals for November 2026

Want to build your monthly crystal toolkit? Explore the full Libra crystal guide for stones connected with truth, clarity, self-worth, and meaning — including the Lapis Lazuli that sharpens the inner voice after a retrograde season. Every stone is genuine, ethically sourced, and real — not dyed, not glass.

Frequently Asked Questions — Libra November 2026

Is November 2026 a good month for Libra?

It's a revalue-and-refine month. The Scorpio New Moon on November 8 (your 2nd house) reopens money and self-worth. Venus (your ruler) and Mercury station direct on November 13. The Gemini Beaver Full Moon on November 24 (your 9th house) is a meaning and belief climax.

How will Venus stationing direct on November 13 affect Libra?

Venus is your ruling planet — its station direct, alongside Mercury, releases October's retrograde season with extra weight. Self-worth, money, and relationship matters that have been under review can finally move forward.

What does the Gemini Beaver Full Moon on November 24 mean for Libra?

It falls in your 9th house of belief, study, travel, and meaning — a climax around a long-building worldview, publishing project, or course. Publish the work; commit to the belief; take the trip.

What is the best crystal for Libra in November 2026?

Lapis Lazuli — it sharpens the inner voice into truth, exactly what a 2nd house Scorpio New Moon (revalue the worth) plus a 9th house Gemini Full Moon (refine the meaning) demand after a Venus retrograde. See the full Libra crystal guide →

Why does Mars conjunct Jupiter in my 11th house matter for Libra?

The November 16 conjunction in your 11th house of community, friends, and long-term vision is a once-every-two-years amplification of collective and friendship-led work. Claim your role in the circle; mend the friendship; lead the dream.
